headline: Southwest Airlines Weighs Geopolitical Fuel Shock Against Service Changes And Valuation
summary: Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) is facing higher jet-fuel costs tied to the intensifying U.S.-Israel-Iran conflict, pressuring its cost base and margins. The carrier is responding with new, stricter seating policies and major cabin upgrades as it adjusts to a competitive U.S. airline market. These developments come while Southwest is also contending with wage inflation and aircraft delivery delays, adding to operational uncertainty. Southwest Airlines, a major U.S. low cost carrier, is...
